dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.drift_chart_subtitle: Current weight vs. target. The next deposit fills underweights first.
dashboard.valuation_subtitle: Z-score over rolling history. Reference, not signal.

buckets.title: Investment Portfolios
buckets.name: Portfolio Name
buckets.initial_investment_hint: How much you're opening this portfolio with
buckets.target_amount_hint: Optional — the total you want to reach
buckets.target_date_hint: Optional — only if you have a specific deadline
buckets.short_warning: Short-term portfolios only allow short-duration bond and cash ETFs
buckets.delete_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to permanently delete '{{name}}'? This action cannot be undone.

deposit.title: Smart Deposit
deposit.prices_stale: ⚠️ Prices may be stale (older than 24 hours)

drawdown.title: Drawdown Simulator
drawdown.question: Could you sleep at night if you lost {{amount}}?
drawdown.no_data: No simulation has been run for this portfolio yet

manage_universe.title: Manage Universe
manage_universe.subtitle: Add, edit, or remove ETFs from the curated universe — no YAML editing required
manage_universe.name: Name
manage_universe.delete_etf_warning: Permanently remove {{ticker}} from the universe? Existing portfolios are not affected.
manage_universe.step1_subtitle: Click to build a detailed prompt with hard eligibility, fundamental + technical criteria, and trusted data sources. Copy it into ChatGPT or Claude.
manage_universe.step2_subtitle: Paste the JSON the AI returned. Backend validates each ETF (TER, AUM, bucket, duplicates, blacklist) and only adds the safe ones.
manage_universe.invalid_json: Could not parse — make sure it is valid JSON

architect.title: Portfolio Construction
architect.step2_subtitle: Pick candidates automatically from your universe — or enter tickers manually below.
architect.auto_select_subtitle: Picks a diversified shortlist (≈23 for LONG, ≈15 for MEDIUM, ≈8 for SHORT) — best-scored ETF in each category, capped to fit REITs/Commodities limits.
architect.manual_tickers_label: Or enter tickers manually (comma or space separated)
architect.ucits_advisory_body: {{us_pct}}% of your allocation is in US-domiciled ETFs. Several have Irish UCITS peers that pay 15% withholding (vs 30%) and defer Israeli tax (Accumulating).
architect.ucits_disclaimer: This is not tax advice. Consult an accountant before investing.
architect.drawdown_review_hint: Before confirming — see how much you could lose in historical crash scenarios.
architect.drawdown_report_title: Drawdown — proposed portfolio against 4 historical crashes
architect.confirm_acknowledgement: By clicking Confirm — you acknowledge the potential loss size.

sectors.title: Sector Analysis
sectors.no_holdings: No holdings with value to compute sectors

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: System view configuration. Changes apply immediately and persist across sessions.
settings.language_note: Interface language. Hebrew flips layout to right-to-left.
settings.theme_note: Dark theme is recommended for long sessions.
settings.accent_note: Used for primary actions, active states, and emphasized data.
settings.density_note: Compact reduces row heights and padding for power users.
settings.sidebar_note: Frees horizontal space on smaller displays.
settings.valuation_note: Display Cheap / Fair / Expensive z-score badges throughout the app.
settings.drift_variant_note: How allocation drift is visualized on the dashboard.
settings.drift_diverging_note: Centered axis, shows direction and magnitude of drift.
settings.drift_tick_note: Linear bar with target marker. Compact.
settings.drift_stacked_note: Current vs target on parallel bars. Detailed.
settings.fred_api_key_note: Required for USD/ILS exchange rates and risk-free rate data.
settings.fred_replace_warning: Are you sure? The current key will be overwritten.
settings.yfinance_note: Market data source — prices, sectors, and fund info. No API key required.
settings.connection_status_note: Live connectivity status of external data services.
settings.us_citizen_help: When checked, the system will not suggest Irish UCITS alternatives due to PFIC tax risk.
settings.backup_help: Create a timestamped copy of the DB next to the original. Recommended before any major portfolio change.

info.ucits_alternative_available: {{us_pct}}% of your allocation is US-domiciled ETFs. Some have Irish UCITS peers that may save on tax.

terms.title: Terms of Use & Disclaimer
terms.signup_consent_prefix: I have read and agree to the Terms of Use and Disclaimer. I understand the software is provided for personal analysis only and does not constitute investment advice.
terms.must_agree: You must agree to the Terms of Use to create an account
terms.loading_failed: Could not load Terms — please try again
terms.version_mismatch: Terms version mismatch — please reload the page and try again
terms.accept_failed: Could not record acceptance — please try again
terms.required_subtitle: We've updated our Terms. You must accept the new version to continue using IQ Invest.

auth.forgot_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset code.
auth.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.

errors.error.ticker_not_in_universe: {{ticker}} is not in the curated universe
errors.error.deposit_plan_already_confirmed: This plan has already been confirmed
